shared_properties: The stage establishes a 1920x1080 single-screen duel hall with the enemy lane high on the right and the player lane low on the left.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while supporting stone and UI panel hues appear inside specs.colors_hex.
Perspective remains shallow and side-on so combat readability wins over environmental depth.
differences: The backdrop combines tall rosewood pillars, dark maroon wall planes, and warm gold trim that frame the duel lanes.
Upper windows and hanging banners concentrate light near the enemy podium while the lower floor remains clear for timing reads.
Background detail is richest near the far edges and quieter behind projectiles and characters.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load academy_hall_backdrop.png during Loading and spawn it as the lowest world layer before characters and projectiles.
runtime_notes: Render as one opaque backdrop sprite at the origin of the fixed orthographic duel camera.
Keep the floor gradient subtle so the timing line and projectiles remain the highest-contrast motion elements.
Do not scroll the background during combat; the duel scene is intentionally fixed.

context.usage: Full-screen academy hall base layer behind all gameplay elements during combat.

composition: Leave the central duel lane behind the projectile path at least 35% darker than bright spell effects.
Reserve the lower-center floor for timing readability with minimal prop clutter.
Keep banner and window ornament concentrated in the upper third of the frame.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 1920x1080 px and fully opaque.
The lower combat lane remains visibly clear when a cyan timing strip mockup is overlaid at the bottom center.
No single background ornament competes with the player or enemy silhouette at 50% preview scale.
